title: dubautia kenwoodii
intro: Dubautia kenwoodii, also known as the Kenwood's Dubautia, is a species of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family native to Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dubautia kenwoodii include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Dubautia kenwoodii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies in Hawaiian traditional medicine.
